rule: Only mark verified after the user-visible acceptance check passes and evidence is recorded.
parallel_rule: Use a separate worktree per task; parallelize only when dependencies are verified and file ownership does not overlap.
inherited_capabilities: Codex command and file lifecycle rendering
Read Only, Default, and Full Access permission modes
mouse interaction and terminal selection behavior
native Codex sessions, resume, fork, and compaction
ChatGPT authentication for the Codex runtime

features.title: Contained Codex-derived Elpis foundation
features.user_visible_behavior: Elpis launches from its own repository and retains Codex-quality tools, permissions, sessions, and TUI behavior without donor-clone access.
acceptance: Build and launch Elpis from a clean checkout.
Complete one authenticated command and file-change turn.

features.title: Stabilize and lighten the imported foundation
features.user_visible_behavior: Elpis becomes smaller and clearer while every retained Codex capability continues to work.
acceptance: Classify candidate surfaces as keep, remove, or decide-later.
Pass remote build, focused checks, and launch smoke after each deletion.
evidence: dd36256 removes the old root TUI, Python agent main, and obsolete Debian builder
GitHub Actions run 29449900034 passed and its artifact launched locally

features.title: Receipts, expiry, and visible model context
features.user_visible_behavior: The user can see why each context item is present, its size and lifetime, and what replaces it when it expires.
acceptance: Compare the visible ledger with the next model request and find no undisclosed item.

features.title: Persistent goal, checkpoints, and exact or lean continuation
features.user_visible_behavior: Work resumes with its goal, decisions, changes, evidence, and next action without replaying irrelevant history.
acceptance: Resume one task exactly and one task leanly, preserving required state in both cases.

features.title: Curated cross-session memory
features.user_visible_behavior: Relevant durable knowledge is retrieved with provenance and stale knowledge can be reviewed or removed.
acceptance: Recall a taught project fact in a related new session and omit it from an unrelated session.

features.title: Transparent /auto model routing
features.user_visible_behavior: Selecting /auto routes each task to an appropriate model from the user's pool and shows the choice and reason.
acceptance: Route agreed easy, medium, and hard examples to their configured tiers while allowing manual override.

features.title: Gemini, Claude, and other runtime adapters
features.user_visible_behavior: A non-Codex runtime enters Elpis while Elpis retains its context, memory, policy, and evidence.
acceptance: Complete and resume one visible task through each supported runtime.
evidence: Experimental Gemini ACP seam is parked on agent/runtime-boundary and is not merged.

features.title: Enforced creator and project behavior
features.user_visible_behavior: Applicable creator and project rules reach every runtime, with enforceable rules checked by code.
acceptance: Run the same behavioral evaluation against two runtimes and record pass or fail evidence.

features.title: Elpis visual identity on Codex-quality rendering
features.user_visible_behavior: Elpis uses its own visual language while retaining Codex command, diff, permission, and session information.
acceptance: Compare representative Codex and Elpis transcripts and find no lost information or interaction.

features.title: Installable and shippable product
features.user_visible_behavior: A new user can install, authenticate, launch, and complete a first task from a clean machine.
acceptance: Complete a clean-environment install and first-task smoke without repository-specific paths.
